revision.text:
[[ja:波治加麻神社]] {{Expand Japanese|波治加麻神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Hajikama Shrine | native_name = 波治加麻神社 | image = Hajikama Shrine's gate.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Hajikama Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.774187|139.424232}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Hajikama Shrine'''|波治加麻神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11380552|ltq=Q11380552|qid=Q11380552|1=List of Shikinaisha in Izu Province}} ** Series ordinal: 39 ** P155: {{ill|Q135039662|ltq=Q135039662|qid=Q135039662|1=Ohotsunoyukino- Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Fusawokino Shrine|lt=Fusawokino Shrine|qid=Q135039663|1=Fusawokino Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q860928|ltq=Q860928|qid=Q860928|1=Izu Province}} * {{ill|Q961511|ltq=Q961511|qid=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}} * {{ill|Ōshima, Tokyo|lt=Oshima|arz|اوشيما|ca|Ōshima|de|Ōshima (Tokio)|en|Ōshima, Tokyo|fa|اوشیما، توکیو|fi|Ōshima (Tokio)|fr|Ōshima (Tokyo)|hy|Օսիմա (ավան)|id|Ōshima, Tōkyō|it|Ōshima (Tokyo)|ja|大島町|javoyage|大島町|ko|오시마정|ms|Ōshima, Tokyo|ru|Осима (посёлок)|th|โอชิมะ (โตเกียว)|uk|Осіма (Токіо)|zh_yue|大島町|zh|大島町|qid=Q1204507|1=Ōshima, Tokyo}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.774187|139.424232}} == inception (P571) == == image (P18) == * Hajikama Shrine's gate.jpg == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181607 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * はじかまじんじゃ == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '東京都大島町泉津48', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:波治加麻神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134930376}} == Japanese content == {{?? |?? = Hajikama Shrine |??= [[File:Hall of Hajikama Shrine.jpg|250px|]]
Hajikama Shrine hall |??? = {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|qid=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}{{ill|lt=?shima|Q1204507|qid=Q1204507|1=Ōshima, Tokyo}}{{ill|lt=Senzu village|Q11554871|qid=Q11554871|lt=Senzu|1=Senzu}}(Kideba) 48 |?? = {{Coord|34|46|31.1|N|139|25|28.6|E|display=inline,title}} |?? = Haji-no-Mikoto |?? = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}?former {{ill|lt=G?-sha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |?? = unknown |?? = |?? = |??? = |?? = May 28 |?? = |?? = {{Location map|Japan|label=????
??|coordinates= {{coord2|34|46|31.1|N|139|25|28.6|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|46|31.1|N|139|25|28.6|E}}}} }} '''Hajikama Shrine''' (????????) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} on {{ill|lt=?shima|Q1204507|qid=Q1204507|1=Ōshima, Tokyo}} ({{ill|lt=Izu ?shima|Q1070580|qid=Q1070580|1=Izu Ōshima}}), {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|qid=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}. It is identified with the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} "Haji Shrine" (??????)[https://www.kyoiku.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/administration/osima/hajikamajinja.html Hajikama Shrine] - Tokyo Metropolitan Board of Education[https://izuoshima-geo.org/know/highlights/culturalsite/bunkasite-9.html Hajikama Shrine] - Izu Oshima Geopark[https://oshima-navi.com/shrine/shrine004.html Hajikama Shrine] - Izu Oshima Navi. === Enshrined deity === * Haji-no-Mikoto (??????) - second son of {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi-no-Kami|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}} (Mishima Daimy?jin) and one consort, Habuhime-no-Mikoto (deity of {{ill|lt=Habuhime-no-Mikoto Shrine|Q134930157|qid=Q134930157|1=Habuhime-no-Mikoto Shrine}}). His elder brother is Ajiko-no-Mikoto, deity of {{ill|lt=?miya Shrine (?shima)|Q131925939|qid=Q131925939|lt=?miya Shrine|1=Omiya Shrine}}. [[????:Hajikama Shrine's gate.jpg|?????|??|Torii]] === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://www.kyoiku.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/administration/osima/hajikamajinja.html Hajikama Shrine] - Tokyo Metropolitan Board of Education * [https://izuoshima-geo.org/know/highlights/culturalsite/bunkasite-9.html Hajikama Shrine] - Izu Oshima Geopark * [https://oshima-navi.com/shrine/shrine004.html Hajikama Shrine] - Izu Oshima Navi == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Hajikama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Hajikama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:Shrines in the Islands of Tokyo Metropolis]] [[Category:大島町の建築物]] [[Category:大島町の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]]
